blurb_en:
Midjourney quietly set V8.1 as its default model on June 10, making native 2K HD the new standard — no separate upscale step, no extra cost.

• The model ships at 2K HD natively — no upscale credits burned.
• Standard generations are 25 percent cheaper than V8.0, and HD mode runs three times faster.
• Raw mode strips Midjourney's default aesthetic polish for creators who want unfiltered prompt adherence.
• New additions include image prompts, image weights, a prompt shortener, and an updated Describe feature.
• At four seconds per standard image and twelve per HD, V8.1 is the fastest Midjourney model to date.
• V8.2 is already in testing — focused on aesthetic stability — with a release expected within weeks.
• Chinese designers are among Midjourney's largest user groups; native 2K removes the main reason to export into Photoshop for print-ready work. Try it at midjourney.com.
blurb_zh:
Midjourney于6月10日悄然将V8.1设为默认模型，原生2K高清输出成为每次生成的标配——不再需要单独放大步骤，也无需额外花费。

• 原生2K高清输出：不消耗放大点数，无需额外操作。
• 标准生成比V8.0便宜25%，高清模式速度提升三倍。
• Raw模式可关闭Midjourney自带的美学风格，适合想要纯粹提示词控制的创作者。
• 新增功能：图像提示、图像权重、提示词简化器及更新版Describe。
• 标准图像生成仅需4秒，高清模式12秒，是目前最快的Midjourney模型。
• 下一个版本V8.2已在测试中，主打美学稳定性，预计数周后发布。
• 中国创作者是Midjourney最大用户群之一；原生2K省去了导入Photoshop处理印刷稿的步骤。前往midjourney.com试用。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Midjourney official update URL, felloai.com review, Releasebot changelog. Multiple sources agree V8.1 became default June 10, 2026. Price cut and HD specs confirmed across sources.

blurb_en:
Lionsgate took an equity stake in Runway on June 11 as part of an expanded partnership to produce AI-generated short-form series from the studio's film catalogue — including potential entries from John Wick and The Hunger Games.

• No cash is changing hands — the stake comes through the content partnership deal itself.
• The original Runway collaboration launched in September 2024, then ran into a wall: Lionsgate's library was reportedly too small to train a bespoke model, and consistent human physics — lip sync, walking — was still broken.
• Despite that track record, Lionsgate is doubling down, led by Chief AI Officer Kathleen Grace and an internal AI steering committee.
• A new joint development program will create both AI extensions of existing IP and original content.
• No release timeline was announced for any of the planned series.
• For the camera context: Hollywood studios producing AI short-form content need reference footage shot by human crews — including 360 degree location capture. Read more.
blurb_zh:
Lionsgate于6月11日宣布入股AI视频公司Runway，双方将合作基于Lionsgate电影IP创作AI短剧系列——《疾速追杀》《饥饿游戏》等大IP均在考虑之列。

• 本次入股不涉及现金注资，股权通过内容合作协议本身来体现。
• 此前合作并不顺利：2024年9月首次合作后接连碰壁——Lionsgate片库太小、人物物理效果（唇形同步、走路）仍不稳定。
• 尽管如此，Lionsgate仍选择加码，由首席AI官Kathleen Grace主导推进。
• 新的联合开发项目将涵盖原创内容及现有IP的AI衍生内容。
• 目前没有给出任何系列作品的发布时间表。
• 好莱坞制作AI短片需要大量参考素材，包括360度实景拍摄——这正是相机行业的新机遇。阅读更多。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, The Wrap, C21Media, No Film School. June 11 date confirmed. Previous 2024-2025 struggles cross-referenced from The Wrap (Nov 2025). Equity-through-content-deal structure confirmed by multiple outlets.

blurb_en:
Krea launched Krea 2 Turbo on June 4 — a speed-optimized variant of its image model that completes generations in two seconds, fast enough to use as a live creative sketchpad.

• Turbo retains full compatibility with Krea 2's style references, moodboards, and LoRAs — it is faster, not weaker.
• At two seconds per image, nothing else at this quality tier comes close on throughput.
• Krea 2 LoRAs — for region-specific edits, lighting, and perspective control — launched for all users the same week.
• Krea 2 ranks number one on Artificial Analysis among images from independent research labs, and sixth globally on the text-to-image leaderboard.
• One caveat Krea is upfront about: Turbo is for rapid ideation, not final renders. Use full Krea 2 when quality is the deliverable.
• Design teams can use Turbo for live creative direction in meetings without staring at a generation queue. Try it at krea.ai.
blurb_zh:
Krea于6月4日推出Krea 2 Turbo——一款速度优先的图像模型变体，生成时间仅需两秒，完全可以当做实时创意草稿本使用。

• Turbo版保留了Krea 2的全套功能：风格参考、情绪板和LoRA——速度快，质量不打折。
• 两秒一张图，在同等质量层级中没有竞争对手。
• Krea 2 LoRA（可精控区域编辑、光线调整、视角变换）同期向所有用户开放。
• Krea 2目前在Artificial Analysis独立研究机构图像排行榜位列第一，全球文生图排行第六。
• Krea官方明确：Turbo定位为快速创意探索，最终输出仍需使用完整Krea 2。
• 设计团队可以用Turbo在会议中实时迭代创意，告别漫长的等待队列。前往krea.ai试用。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Krea official release notes and product page. June 4, 2026 launch date confirmed. Two-second speed, LoRA compatibility, leaderboard ranking confirmed across multiple sources.
